question:
REMOVABLE MEDIA IN A SCIF
What action should you take when using removable media in a Sensitive Compartmented Information Facility (SCIF)?
canonical_answer: Identify and disclose it with local Configuration/Change Management Control and Property Management authorities

appears_in.title: 2022 Cyber Awareness Challenge Answers
